---
title: "New year"
author: "Guozheng Huang"
date: "2024-01-01"
categorise: ["Daily"]
toc: true
image: "image.jpg"
---

---

Hello, 2024.

I have written a simple introduce about the ceremony of *greeting the Gods* in Xibu this morning. Its content encouraged Fantuan and Zhuang to visit Grandpa Feizhen and Grandma Tan this afternoon.
